name: widget-grid
title: Widget Grid
description: Twelve-column dashboard layout with drag move, edge resize, ghost previews, and keyboard cell editing.

files.content:
export {
  DEFAULT_COLUMNS,
  clampWidget,
  compactLayout,
  layoutById,
  layoutEquals,
  moveWidget,
  normalizeLayout,
  resizeWidget,
  resolveLayoutKeeping,
  widgetsOverlap,
  type WidgetGridBounds,
  type WidgetGridLayout,
  type WidgetLayoutItem,
} from "./layout"
export {
  cellDeltaFromPointer,
  cellMetricsFromGridRect,
  translateFromCellDelta,
  type WidgetGridCellDelta,
  type WidgetGridCellMetrics,
} from "./pointer"
export { parseLayout, serializeLayout } from "./serialize"
